prompt: The 15- to 19-year-old women group is a good option to expand our market share and profits because the purchasing power is estimated to increase by 22 billion dollars in the 2010-2025 period and the size of this group is estimated to increase by 6 million in this same period. Another positive aspect of this group is the fact that it is not vital to invest in website content because the majority of this group prefer magazines than blogs. The cons are: this market already has 6 competitive products and only 29% of this group purchases at least a magazine month. Although the 18- to 24-year-old men group has more purchase power and it is bigger than the 15- to 19-year-old women group, the size of the males is expected to decrease by 5 million in the 2010-2025 period. Also, it is expected that the purchasing power will stay almost steady: it will increase by 2 billion dollars in the 2010-2025 period.
